title: Liquidity Strategy
subtitle: Bootstrapping & Managing Liquidity
description: Strategic approaches to bootstrapping liquidity, market-making, token incentives, and managing LP positions across DEXes on Base.

lessons.title: Liquidity Bootstrapping
lessons.description: Strategies for initial liquidity events — LBP, LGE, and initial DEX offerings.
lessons.topics: Liquidity bootstrapping, Balancer LBP, Fjord Foundry, Initial DEX offering

lessons.title: Concentrated Liquidity
lessons.description: Managing Uniswap V3-style concentrated liquidity positions for maximum efficiency.
lessons.topics: Concentrated liquidity, Range orders, Fee tiers, Rebalancing

lessons.title: Incentive Design
lessons.description: Designing token incentives to attract and retain liquidity providers.
lessons.topics: LP incentives, Emission distribution, Vesting for LPs, Vote-escrow models

lessons.title: Stable Pool Management
lessons.description: Managing stablecoin pools, pegged assets, and balancing pool composition.
lessons.topics: Stable pools, Peg management, Curve / Aerodrome, Pool composition

lessons.title: Cross-Chain Liquidity
lessons.description: Strategies for managing liquidity across multiple chains and bridges.
lessons.topics: Cross-chain liquidity, Bridge selection, Wormhole / LayerZero, Unified liquidity
